CS003.message: node runtime not found (optional for some skills)

CS100.message: install directory already exists with conflicting content
CS100.fix: Back up and remove: mv ~/.claude/skills/cavestack ~/.claude/skills/cavestack.bak && rerun setup

CS102.message: SHA256 checksum mismatch on install script
CS102.fix: Do not trust this installer. Report at https://github.com/JerkyJesse/cavestack/issues

CS200.fix: Run: cavestack-config list — see valid keys

CS201.fix: Check expected type. Boolean keys accept true/false. Run: cavestack-config get KEY to see current value

CS300.fix: Run: cavestack-skills list — see all available skills

CS301.fix: Extract sections into separate resolver files or trim voice markup

CS302.message: skill discovery blocked — symlink target missing

CS400.fix: Run: cd ~/.claude/skills/cavestack/browse && bun install && bun run build

CS402.message: design binary needs OpenAI API key
CS402.fix: Run: design setup — or set OPENAI_API_KEY in environment

CS600.message: cavestack run could not intercept Claude Code session
CS600.fix: Update Claude Code to latest. Check: claude --version

CS601.fix: Raise with --budget N, or run task in smaller steps

CS602.fix: Check file exists and has right permissions: chmod 600 ~/.cavestack/sessions/*.replay

CS603.message: share command refused — non-redacted record detected
CS603.fix: Re-record with redaction enabled (default), or review the record and manually remove secrets before retrying

CS701.message: migration ran but is not idempotent on this install

CS800.fix: Proceed offline. Upgrade manually later: cd ~/.claude/skills/cavestack && git pull && ./setup

CS801.message: upgrade aborted — uncommitted changes in cavestack dir
CS801.fix: Commit or stash: cd ~/.claude/skills/cavestack && git stash

CS901.fix: Track progress in docs/roadmap.md. Request priority via GitHub Issues.
